title: Fix internal error after suppressible MODDUP warning
body:
What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?
```
verilator sv-bugpoint-minimized.sv --binary
```

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?
```
kreijstal@kreijstalnuc:~/git/risc-v-lab/build/sw_rlight/combined/sv_out$ verilator --version
perl: warning: Setting locale failed.
perl: warning: Please check that your locale settings:
        LANGUAGE = (unset),
        LC_ALL = (unset),
        LC_CTYPE = "en_GB.UTF-8",
        LC_NUMERIC = (unset),
        LC_COLLATE = (unset),
        LC_TIME = (unset),
        LC_MESSAGES = (unset),
        LC_MONETARY = (unset),
        LC_ADDRESS = (unset),
        LC_IDENTIFICATION = (unset),
        LC_MEASUREMENT = (unset),
        LC_PAPER = (unset),
        LC_TELEPHONE = (unset),
        LC_NAME = (unset),
        LANG = "de_DE.UTF-8"
    are supported and installed on your system.
perl: warning: Falling back to a fallback locale ("de_DE.UTF-8").
Verilator 5.039 devel rev v5.038-60-g763183f06
```

What OS and distribution are you using?
archlinux
May we assist you in trying to fix this in Verilator yourself?
I have no idea why the error is there
(Please avoid attaching screenshots that show text - you can convert images to text using e.g. https://ocr.space)


This was minimized with sv-bugpoint. Run with `--binary`
```


`line 429 "/home/kreijstal/git/risc-v-lab/src/rtl/rv_dm/pkg/dm_pkg.sv" 0
`line 1 "/home/kreijstal/git/risc-v-lab/src/rtl/rv_dm/pkg/rvlab_tap_pkg.sv" 1
package rvlab_tap_pkg;

endpackage

`line 1 "/home/kreijstal/git/risc-v-lab/src/rtl/rvlab_fpga/iocell_opendrain.sv" 1

);
  IOBUF iocell (
    .O (in),   
    .IO(pad),   
    .I ('0),    
    .T (~oe)    
  );
endmodule

endpackage
```
